# ROI calculator

## When to use

Use when economic buyer is involved.

## Why it works

Quantifies pain and upside.

## Mechanism

Finance needs numbers.

## Required inputs

Calculator with assumptions and sensitivity.

## When not to use

If assumptions are fake.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Calculator completions, sales-qualified leads.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
